calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /CourtListener|courtlistener|citation|docket|case law/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const names = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => x.name==="mcp__courtlistener__search"); const d=names[0]; if(!d){text("missing");exit();} const m=d.description.match(/declare const tools:[\s\S]*/); text(m?m[0]:d.description);
